evaluations.name: odh-dashboard-critical-bugs
evaluations.description: Analyze recent critical bugs in ODH Dashboard and assess test coverage

input.jql: project = RHOAIENG AND component = 'AI Core Dashboard' AND priority = Critical AND created >= -90d

evaluations.name: model-registry-upgrade-bugs
evaluations.description: Analyze upgrade-related bugs in Model Registry to identify E2E test gaps

input.jql: project = RHOAIENG AND component = 'Model Registry' AND labels = upgrade-issue AND priority in (Blocker, Critical)

evaluations.name: kserve-platform-specific-bugs
evaluations.description: Analyze ARM/Power/s390x platform-specific bugs to validate categorization

input.jql: project = RHOAIENG AND component = KServe AND (labels in (arm, power, s390x) OR summary ~ 'ARM')

evaluation_instructions.setup: Replace /path/to/* with actual repository paths. Ensure JIRA credentials are configured in .env file.
evaluation_instructions.run: Execute skill with each evaluation's input parameters and compare output against expected_output and success_criteria.
evaluation_instructions.metrics: Track runtime, accuracy (manual validation of COVERED bugs), false positive rate, and category detection rates.
evaluation_instructions.baseline_comparison: Compare results against baseline metrics. Flag degradations >10%.
evaluation_instructions.multi_model: Run each evaluation on all specified models (haiku/sonnet/opus) to verify consistency.
evaluation_instructions.pass_criteria: All success_criteria must be true, output within expected ranges, and baselines within 10% variance.
